_comment: Team, grouped. Each person needs only a name; every other field is optional and the card degrades gracefully. To add a photo, drop a square-ish image at public/images/team/<name>.jpg and set 'photo' to '/images/team/<name>.jpg'. Undergraduate photos were not reliably recoverable from the old site, so they fall back to a monogram avatar until added.
